default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between AfterShoot and GrowthX to discuss content production, quality improvements, and strategic alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/NN74CmPzC8JF-yvjao6hyLhdznLvPUAN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content quality needs significant improvement: structure, readability, and unique insights are lacking](https://fathom.video/share/NN74CmPzC8JF-yvjao6hyLhdznLvPUAN?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [New streamlined outline process proposed: focus on skeleton structure and unique value-adds](https://fathom.video/share/NN74CmPzC8JF-yvjao6hyLhdznLvPUAN?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Production goal set for 20 articles in the next two weeks to catch up on backlog](https://fathom.video/share/NN74CmPzC8JF-yvjao6hyLhdznLvPUAN?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [YouTube channel identified as valuable resource for insights and quotes to enhance content](https://fathom.video/share/NN74CmPzC8JF-yvjao6hyLhdznLvPUAN?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality Concerns

  - [Current content is lengthy, clunky, and unreadable](https://fathom.video/share/NN74CmPzC8JF-yvjao6hyLhdznLvPUAN?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Lacks structure, perspective, and logical flow](https://fathom.video/share/NN74CmPzC8JF-yvjao6hyLhdznLvPUAN?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [Not engaging readers effectively](https://fathom.video/share/NN74CmPzC8JF-yvjao6hyLhdznLvPUAN?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [Need to understand audience awareness stage and align content accordingly](https://fathom.video/share/NN74CmPzC8JF-yvjao6hyLhdznLvPUAN?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Quality improvement hasn't been consistent since contract start (end of February)](https://fathom.video/share/NN74CmPzC8JF-yvjao6hyLhdznLvPUAN?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)

### New Content Approach

  - [Proposed streamlined outline process:](https://fathom.video/share/NN74CmPzC8JF-yvjao6hyLhdznLvPUAN?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
      - [Basic skeleton structure with one-liner headings](https://fathom.video/share/NN74CmPzC8JF-yvjao6hyLhdznLvPUAN?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
      - [Emphasis on unique perspectives, data, and SERP gap-filling strategies](https://fathom.video/share/NN74CmPzC8JF-yvjao6hyLhdznLvPUAN?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
      - [Helps guide AI generation, writers, and editors](https://fathom.video/share/NN74CmPzC8JF-yvjao6hyLhdznLvPUAN?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [AfterShoot to provide internal data, expert insights, and additional resources](https://fathom.video/share/NN74CmPzC8JF-yvjao6hyLhdznLvPUAN?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [YouTube channel identified as valuable source for photographer insights and quotes](https://fathom.video/share/NN74CmPzC8JF-yvjao6hyLhdznLvPUAN?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)

### Production Goals and Process

  - [Aim to publish 20 articles in the next two weeks (10 per week)](https://fathom.video/share/NN74CmPzC8JF-yvjao6hyLhdznLvPUAN?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [Current pipeline: 8 upcoming, 2 for regeneration, 12 new to be produced](https://fathom.video/share/NN74CmPzC8JF-yvjao6hyLhdznLvPUAN?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [Batch processing proposed: 10 outlines at a time for efficient review and production](https://fathom.video/share/NN74CmPzC8JF-yvjao6hyLhdznLvPUAN?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Long-term goal of 30 pieces live per month](https://fathom.video/share/NN74CmPzC8JF-yvjao6hyLhdznLvPUAN?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)

### Keyword Research and Content Strategy

  - [New Looker Studio dashboard added for keyword cohorting](https://fathom.video/share/NN74CmPzC8JF-yvjao6hyLhdznLvPUAN?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Focus areas identified: AI tools for photography, automating editing, intelligent workflows, practical guides, and checklists](https://fathom.video/share/NN74CmPzC8JF-yvjao6hyLhdznLvPUAN?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
